results.matched_effect_cluster: Agent Memory Survey Tiered Pattern C
results.justification: EXACT TWIN — Pattern C tiered memory (context, structured DB, vector store, cold archive) with learned controller IS the 3-tier landmark memory architecture mechanism.
Benchmark of tiered memory architectures including incremental multi-turn evaluation covers tiered landmark memory paradigm.
Agentic memory with store/retrieve/update/summarize/discard tools covers the deposit-pointer + tier-promotion mechanism in OVOO.
EXACT TWIN — Hierarchical memory imitating human memorization with segment-level recurrence IS the multi-tier landmark memory mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — Hierarchical memory with position-index searched layer-by-layer IS the multi-tier spatial-hash landmark memory mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — Method-of-loci memory palace spatial-landmark anchoring IS the spatial-landmark memory architecture mechanism in OVOO-LANDMARK-TIER.
LSH-based pre-attention token eviction + spatial-hash bucketing covers spatial-hash key-value localization mechanism.
Conditional memory via scalable lookup covers tiered memory access pattern with controlled retrieval.
